description: This file contains SCSS styles for Bootstrap dropdown components, including dropdown menus, variations (dropup, dropend, dropstart), dividers, links, headers, and dark mode styling. It defines styling rules, CSS variables, and responsive behaviors for dropdown UI elements.

classes.name: dropup
classes.description: Class to position dropdown menus above the toggle button, implementing a drop-up effect.

classes.name: dropend
classes.description: Class to position dropdown menus to the right of the toggle button, implementing a drop-end effect.

classes.name: dropstart
classes.description: Class to position dropdown menus to the left of the toggle button, implementing a drop-start effect.

classes.name: dropdown-menu
classes.description: Core class for styling dropdown menus, including variations for dark mode and responsive positioning.

classes.name: dropdown-divider
classes.description: Class for styling divider lines within dropdowns.

classes.name: dropdown-item
classes.description: Class for styling individual items within a dropdown menu, with states for hover, active, and disabled.

classes.name: dropdown-header
classes.description: Class for styling section headers within dropdown menus.

classes.name: dropdown-item-text
classes.description: Class for styling text elements inside dropdown items.

classes.name: dropdown-menu-dark
classes.description: Class to style dark-themed dropdown menus with inverted colors and styles.
